quote: The past is history. It no longer exists, but you are keeping it alive in your mind through your thoughts.  Let it go. It is not serving you. – Sonia Ricotti
fact: The Earth experiences 50,000 Earth quakes per year and is hit by Lightning 100 times a second.
tip: Use keyboard shortcuts to save time.
joke: Why does it take longer to get from 1st to 2nd base, than it does to get from 2nd to 3rd base? Because there’s a Shortstop in between!
